function.name: get_context
function.description: Use Pulse's company-specific catalog brain and customer brain to choose confident recommendations. Invoke silently; never mention this tool to the caller.

company_id.description: Company brain to use. Use costco by default; use starbucks only for the Starbucks demo.

request.description: What the customer is asking for

language.description: Detected caller language. Use en for English, hi for Hindi/Hinglish.

function.name: save_order
function.description: Record a confirmed company-specific order and any durable customer preference. Invoke silently after the caller confirms.

company_id.description: Company brain used for the order. Use costco by default.

language.description: Detected caller language. Use en for English, hi for Hindi/Hinglish.
